name: HMS Stalwart (W 07)
events: 9 Nov 1941 HMS Sunfish was towed from Harwich to Sheerness by HMS Stalwart. (1)
13 Nov 1941 HMS Sunfish departed Sheerness for Portsmouth still in tow of HMS Stalwart. They were escorted by HMS Holderness (Cdr. F.J.C. Halahan, DSC, RN). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
